creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Mon Aug 13 19:04:49 2012
New Revision: 302476
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302476

Log:
  - update to version 0.6.1
  - use @dirrm (not @dirrmtry) for the port's own directories
  - don't even try to @dirrmtry other ports directories
  
  while here:
  - use CHEESESHOP shortcut and remove unnecessary MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
  - strict python version to 2.x only
  - add missing dependency on www/py-django-classy-tags
  
  PR:		169597
  Submitted by:	bsam
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (6 weeks)

Modified:
  head/www/py-django-sekizai/Makefile
  head/www/py-django-sekizai/distinfo
  head/www/py-django-sekizai/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/py-django-sekizai/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-sekizai/Makefile	Mon Aug 13 17:57:26 2012	(r302475)
+++ head/www/py-django-sekizai/Makefile	Mon Aug 13 19:04:49 2012	(r302476)
@@ -6,18 +6,18 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	django-sekizai
-PORTVERSION=	0.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.6.1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_CHEESESHOP}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	source/d/${PORTNAME}
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	xenophon+fbsdports@irtnog.org
 COMMENT=	Block templating system for Django
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/django/bin/django-admin.py:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django-classy-tags>=0.3.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django-classy-tags
 
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-django-sekizai/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-sekizai/distinfo	Mon Aug 13 17:57:26 2012	(r302475)
+++ head/www/py-django-sekizai/distinfo	Mon Aug 13 19:04:49 2012	(r302476)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (django-sekizai-0.5.tar.gz) = 92053b39583301c25dfcab82eea7a38dc04112552c03eea960a2389115e52e8b
-SIZE (django-sekizai-0.5.tar.gz) = 5940
+SHA256 (django-sekizai-0.6.1.tar.gz) = d62543fa357ba61785e03706046d89c483296ff85393045ac7f04f004c757d91
+SIZE (django-sekizai-0.6.1.tar.gz) = 6123

Modified: head/www/py-django-sekizai/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-sekizai/pkg-plist	Mon Aug 13 17:57:26 2012	(r302475)
+++ head/www/py-django-sekizai/pkg-plist	Mon Aug 13 19:04:49 2012	(r302476)
@@ -31,9 +31,7 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai/tests.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai/tests.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai/tests.pyo
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai/templatetags
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%
-@dirrmtry %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai/templatetags
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/sekizai
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
